steps.t: Lúmar has asked you to search through the shredded pack that you found for any information that might tie it to Igerna. You can search through the pac…
You should search through the pack for clues. The pack is on the table next to Lúmar, in Ost Arndír.
You should continue searching through the pack for clues. The pack is on the table next to Lúmar, in Ost Arndír.
While searching through Igerna's pack, you found a hastily scrawled note addressed to Lúmar. You should read the note. The note is on the table next t…
Lúmar is waiting to speak with you about what was written on the note you found. Lúmar is in Ost Arndír.
